name: the-alter-ego-effect
description: Todd Herman's The Alter Ego Effect — create a secret identity to overcome self-doubt, perform under pressure, and access your highest potential when it matters most
useCase: Helps anyone who struggles with self-doubt, performance anxiety, or impostor syndrome create an alter ego that accesses their peak performance — whether for presentations, sports, interviews, or tough conversations.
knownRisks: The alter ego approach is a tool, not an identity change — users should maintain connection to their core self
